other_findings.finding: SkO capillary arterioles unable to further differentiate into arterioles unlike prenatal skin
GATA2 and NFATC1 regulons downregulated in SkO capillary arterioles
Sprouting angiogenesis gene signature increased in SkO capillary arterioles but unable to guide stalk cells

evidence_quotes.quote: Unlike SkO capillary arteriole cells, prenatal skin capillary arteriole cells could further differentiate into arterioles
despite strong expression of the sprouting angiogenesis gene signature, SkO capillary arteriole cells are unable to guide stalk cells for new blood vessel formation
